creator: m230761@ingenieria.ingsala.unal.edu.co
text:
The "porting guidelines" page that came with the release have bad html
format, The problem may be present in other documents, and may persist 
in the actual documentation.

Fix: 

If the faulty tag(s) are dificult to find, Linux's asWedit will
report the problem.
How-To-Repeat: Use of the Arena browser on the mentioned document, will report the
lack of standard conformance.
